CREATE TABLE test_low_cardinality (id Int32, value LowCardinality(String));
SELECT toLowCardinality(value) FROM test_low_cardinality WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT toLowCardinality(value) FROM test_low_cardinality) AS subquery;
SELECT t1.val, toLowCardinality(t2.value) FROM t1 JOIN test_low_cardinality AS t2 ON t1.val = t2.id;
SELECT toLowCardinality(CONCAT(value, ' fruit')) FROM test_low_cardinality WHERE value LIKE 'a%';
SELECT toLowCardinality(value) AS low_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_low_cardinality) AS derived_table;
CREATE TABLE t2 (name LowCardinality(String), score Float64);
SELECT toLowCardinality(name) FROM t2 GROUP BY name;
SELECT toLowCardinality(name) = 'Alice' FROM t2 HAVING count(*) > 1;
SELECT DISTINCT toLowCardinality(name) FROM t2 ORDER BY name;
SELECT toLowCardinality(average_score) FROM (SELECT AVG(score) AS average_score FROM t2);
SELECT toLowCardinality(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_low_cardinality WHERE id IN (1,2)));
